bird.name: Luzon scops owl
bird.summary: The Luzon scops owl (Otus longicornis) or the Luzon highland scops owl is a species of scops owl endemic to Luzon, Philippines. Not to be c…

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

locations.name: Luzon tropical pine forests
locations.summary: The Luzon tropical pine forests are a tropical coniferous forest ecoregion of the Philippines in the western Pacific Oc…

locations.name: 北伊羅戈省
locations.summary: 北伊羅戈省（英語：Ilocos Norte Province），是一個位於菲律賓呂宋島的省份。首府為佬沃市。 根據地圖顯示方位，其位於呂宋島的北部，向北的位置為巴坦群島省；向西的位置為南海；向東的位置為阿巴堯省；向南的位置則是面對阿布拉省。

locations.name: 伊莎貝拉省
locations.summary: 伊莎貝拉省（英語：Isabela Province），是一個位於菲律賓呂宋島的省份。首府為伊拉甘。名称来自西班牙女王伊莎贝拉二世，當時安東尼奧·德·烏爾比茲通多·埃吉亞是菲律賓的總督。這個新省份是為了紀念西班牙女王伊莎貝拉二世而命名的，其…

locations.name: 新怡詩夏省
locations.summary: 新怡詩夏省（英語：Nueva Ecija Province），是一個位於菲律賓呂宋島的內陸省份。首府為帕拉延市。歷史古城潘塔邦安鎮（Pantabangan town）位於本省。 根據地圖顯示方位，其位於呂宋島的北部，向北的位置為新比斯開省…

locations.name: 马尼拉
locations.summary: 马尼拉（菲律賓語：Maynilà，發音：[majˈnilaʔ]；英語：Manila），正式名稱為馬尼拉市（菲律賓語：Lungsod ng Maynila），又稱馬尼剌（白話字：Bîn-lí-la）、岷里拉（簡稱岷市）或小呂宋，是菲律宾的首…

locations.name: 布拉干省
locations.summary: 布拉干省或譯布拉坎省（Bulacan）是菲律賓的一個省份，位於中央呂宋政區。首府是馬洛洛斯市。布拉干省西鄰邦板牙省、北鄰新怡詩夏省、奧羅拉省及奎松省，南邊為黎剎省。布拉干省也位於馬尼拉灣的北岸。 行政區域 布拉干省劃分為21個自治市及3個…

locations.name: 奎松省
locations.summary: 若要查看菲律賓最大城-奎松市，請參見頁面「奎松市」 奎松省（英語：Quezon Province），是一個位於菲律賓呂宋島的省份。首府為盧塞納市。 根據地圖顯示方位，其位於呂宋島的中部，向北的位置為奧羅拉省；向西的位置為八打雁省；向東的位…

relations.subject: Luzon scops owl
relations.evidence: The Luzon scops owl is known to be found in rainforest, montane forest, and tropical pine forest habitats at altitudes generally ranging anywhere from 350 to 1,800 m, but it may also be found at heights upwards of 2,200m. Although its habitat range across Luzon appears to be relatively large, it is noted to be uncommon and has a patchy distribution that corresponds to its preferred, highland habitats. It has been recorded primarily in northern Luzon provinces such as Ilocos Norte, Benguet, Cagayan, Isabela, Nueva Ecija, or near Manila in Bulacan and Quezon

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Luzon scops owl
relations.evidence: There is no known information on population size and little known on population trends besides the high likelihood that it is decreasing. This species is still declining due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Luzon scops owl
relations.evidence: Activities that contribute to deforestation such as logging, mining and the growth of agricultural land in the region of Luzon pose a threat to its endemic species. It is heavily suggested that critical habitats for the Luzon scops owl and other endangered or threatened birds be protected at all altitudes
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
